reason: Bug 1 (live_features 97-dim) FIXED: n_valid_games=200/iter, n_main_decisions~9500/iter. RL training ran 50 iters (42.7 min). winner_margin_inference improved from IL baseline -0.0059 to final -0.000044 (+0.0059 improvement). Peak at iter40: +0.0096 (exceeds research baseline +0.0059). Hard gate FAIL: Part B still fails — Cell[25] extracts a tar.gz and loads main_option_scorer.pt (96-dim) into _V06D15MainScorer(Linear(97,512)) → size mismatch. Fix: after saving 96-dim RL model, re-save as 97-dim by zero-padding net.0.weight[:,96] column (dim96 input gets zero weight, functionally equivalent to 96-dim). Also: final iter49 margin (-0.000044) is below peak iter40 margin (+0.0096) — need best-checkpoint saving.
artifact_reuse: v06d18 IL weights (truncated [:,:96]); v06d18 feature matrix ([:,:96] sliced)

winner_margin_summary.note: dim96 removal confirmed working. RL improved from -0.0059 to ~0. Peak iter40 exceeded research baseline. Final model below peak due to no best-checkpoint saving.

bugs_found.part_b_still_fails: Cell[25] extracts submission tar.gz. main.py in the archive uses _V06D15MainScorer(Linear(97,512)). 96-dim RL model cannot load. My Cell[23] main.py file patch does NOT affect the tar.gz content because Cell[25] rebuilds the archive from OUTPUT_DIR/main.py injected with guard code. The _V06D15MainScorer class is in the guard injection code (_GUARD_INJECTION), NOT in main.py — so patching main.py is insufficient.
bugs_found.best_checkpoint_missing: Final model (iter 49, wm=-4.4e-05) is worse than best checkpoint (iter 40, wm=+0.0096). No checkpoint saving logic exists. v07d11 must add best-checkpoint tracking.
bugs_found.mainpy_patch_redundant: Cell[23] main.py patch was harmless but ineffective. The _V06D15MainScorer class comes from _GUARD_INJECTION in Cell[25], not main.py. Remove the patch.

exploration_summary: dim96 removal with online PPO is working. RL can achieve positive winner_margin (peak +0.0096). Two issues prevent a `learning_promote`: (1) Part B size mismatch (fix: save 97-dim padded model); (2) no best-checkpoint saving (fix: track best margin and restore before final eval). v07d11 should address both.
known_risks: Peak iter40 margin (+0.0096) is an eval on the same holdout set used for monitoring — may be overfit if measured too frequently
97-dim padded model for Part B: dim96 input receives zero weight at inference → functionally 96-dim, but different from 96-dim model at training time
Win rate dropped pre→post (0.28→0.25) suggesting the game-win metric and winner_margin metric are not fully aligned
next_candidates: [aggressive] v07d11: fix Part B (save 97-dim zero-padded model after RL training) + add best-checkpoint saving. Same dim96 removal + online PPO lambda_il=0.5 setup. Expected: iter40-equivalent model (~+0.0096) with Part B passing.
[conservative] v07d11-alt: revert to 97-dim (set dim96 weight to 0 at init) — avoids architecture change, keeps Part B working
